THE KYAW KYAR Standard

Why Buy From Kyaw Kyar?

Rigorous Quality Inspection

Every vehicle undergoes a rigorous inspection of the engine, chassis, and all mechanical components to ensure the highest quality before arriving at our showroom.

Learn More

Flexible Financing

we offer flexible payment plans, including direct showroom installments and bank financing options through our partners AYA, CB, and KBZ.

Learn More

Resell at Market Price

For vehicles purchased from our showroom, we offer a guaranteed buy-back option at current market value whenever you are ready to sell.

Learn More

Clean History Only

We guarantee a 100% clean history for every vehicle. Our selection excludes 'Owner Book' copies, illegal modifications, and any legal complications, ensuring you drive away with total confidence.

Learn More

Our Showrooms

About KyawKyar

With full reliability and accountability

Kyaw Kyar Car Showroom first opened on 23 March 2018. From the day we opened until today, we have stood firm and sold with full transparency, responsibility, and accountability, always putting kindness first toward every customer who has bought from us. Kyaw Kyar Car Showroom sells every vehicle with a 100% guarantee that it is completely free of accidents, license issues, and any liens or encumbrances. If you wish to sell back a car you bought from us, we will buy it back at market price at any time. Thank you very much. U Kyaw Kyar

Contact Us

Kyaw Kyar

For over 7 years, we've been helping families across Myanmar find their perfect vehicles. With our reliable and thoroughly inspected cars, we are always here for our dear customers whenever you're looking to buy a vehicle.
